title: vault: non-2xx response body discarded, error loses Vault detail
description: Trigger: vault.get() or put() receives non-2xx status. Current code returns Err(Backend { source: 'HTTP 403' }) with no body. Vault includes error details in the body: {"errors": ["1 error occurred: permission denied"]}. The caller sees only the status code. Fix: read body bytes on non-2xx, attempt to extract errors[0] with a simple scan, include in error message. Fall back to 'HTTP N' if body parse fails. This is a readability improvement for operators debugging permission issues.
